{{Quote| Commodore Zuggs, activate the heat mechanism in the Antisecurity Device.|Trioculus|<ref name="lcj" />}}
'''Zuggs''' was a [[Human/Legends|Human]] [[Gender/Legends|male]] who served as an [[Imperial officer/Legends|officer]] in the [[Imperial Navy/Legends|naval forces]] of [[Palpatine/Legends|Palpatine's]] [[Galactic Empire/Legends|Galactic Empire]].<ref name="swr" /> Following the [[Death/Legends|death]] of [[Galactic Emperor/Legends|Emperor]] Palpatine at the [[Battle of Endor/Legends|Battle of Endor]], the Imperial [[Throne/Legends|throne]] was left empty.<ref name="ROTJ">{{Film|VI}}</ref> In [[5 ABY/Legends|5 ABY]], a mutant named [[Trioculus]] campaigned to become the next Emperor, with the support of the [[Central Committee of Grand Moffs]].<ref name="godv">''[[The Glove of Darth Vader]]''</ref> [[Commodore/Legends|Commodore]] Zuggs served as the commander of the would-be-Emperor's personal [[Strike-class medium cruiser|''Strike''-class cruiser]]. He assisted Trioculus and [[Grand Moff/Legends|Grand Moff]] [[Bertroff Hissa]] to [[Scardia Station]] in the [[Null Zone/Legends|Null Zone]] so that the pretender to the throne could receive a [[dark blessing]] from [[Kadann]], the [[Supreme Prophet]] of the [[Dark side of the Force/Legends|Dark Side]]. The so-called Kadann, who was in fact an [[Rajah Ubooki|imposter]], directed Trioculus to the [[Yavin 4/Legends|fourth]] [[Moon/Legends|moon]] of [[Yavin Prime/Legends|Yavin Prime]], where he was meant to locate and kill the [[Adventures of a Jedi Prince|Jedi Prince]]. Zuggs brought his master to his destination, keeping his cruiser in orbit while Trioculus plotted to exterminate the members of the enemy [[Senate Planetary Intelligence Network]].<ref name="lcj" />

==Personality and traits==
Commodore Zuggs was a beady-[[Eye/Legends|eyed]] man who, by the time of the Trioculus affair, had gone bald. In response to the loss of his [[Hair/Legends|hair]], he used to shave his head clean.<ref name="lcj" />

==Appearances==
*[[Star Wars: Rebellion (video game)|''Star Wars: Rebellion'']]
